title: Non-record Submission: CrystalGPT + Diamond Fusion — Ternary Crystal Architecture
body:
## CrystalGPT + Diamond Fusion (Non-record Submission)

**Author:** Warren Reed Baum (@delistish)

### Architecture
Novel crystal lattice architecture inspired by [Ternary Crystal Computing](https://arxiv.org/abs/placeholder) (Baum, 2026):

- **Single shared transformer block** repeated N times with per-iteration **crystal modulation gates**
- **Diamond Fusion junctions** — consensus-weighted expert fusion with agreement bonus
- **Ternary voting ensemble** — YES/NO/MAYBE state space (uncertainty as first-class citizen)
- **U-Net skip connections** across crystal iterations
- **~3.4M parameters** (vs 17M for 11-layer unique-block baselines)

### Results
- **Smoke test (M4 Mac Mini, 5 steps):** 4.18 bpb
- **Hardware:** Apple M4 (no H100s yet — compute grant submitted)
- **Category:** Non-record (novel architecture exploration)

### Key Insight
Parameter tying through crystal iteration (one block, many passes) is extremely parameter-efficient. The architecture naturally implements depth recurrence — one of the techniques the challenge description highlights as promising.

### Files
- `crystal_model.py` — Full CrystalGPT + DiamondFusion + CrystalMoE architecture
- `train_crystal_mlx.py` / `train_gpt_mlx.py` — MLX training scripts
- `records/track_non_record_16mb/2026-03-25_CrystalGPT_DiamondFusion_M4/` — Submission artifacts

Full training run on H100s pending compute grant approval. Score will improve significantly with proper training budget.
